title: Xtra Flaky French Macaroni Pasta
description: A salty, flaky, and comforting French dish featuring macaroni, perfect for a sick day, made with low-glycemic ingredients and cooked on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the macaroni according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large saucepan, whisk together the unsalted butter, sea salt, black pepper, and garlic powder over medium heat until the butter is melted.
Add the heavy cream to the saucepan and whisk until smooth.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the shredded gruyere cheese until melted and smooth.
Drain the cooked macaroni and add it to the cheese sauce, stirring until well combined.
Transfer the macaroni mixture to a cedar plank and top with chopped fresh parsley.
Bake the macaroni in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the macaroni is heated through.
